title: Copper Pressure Plates
description: Copper Pressure Plates with a unique function
body:
> **NOTE:** _This mod is packaged as part of [Great Big World](https://modrinth.com/mod/great-big-world) and was made a standalone mod so that players can enjoy it separately. Do not download both with the intent of using them together._
> 
# Copper Pressure Plates
A simple mod that add Copper Pressure Plates to the game. These are craftable like any other pressure plate (with Copper, of course). They oxidize and are waxable like any other Copper type block.

Copper Pressure Plates have a special functionality: they emit a pulse when walking *off* of them. This means they can be used as landmine triggers. The level of oxidization affects the delay after which the pulse is emitted when walking off of the pressure plate.

Check out the video below for a better look:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/WZaKFOhNG3g" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

> _This mod is free to use in modpacks with credit._
